title: MicroApps Launcher Registry
description: Registry of micro-applications managed by the MicroApps Launcher. All path fields use forward slashes and are normalized per-OS at runtime.

$schema.description: Optional path/URI to this schema for editor tooling.

version.description: Registry format version. Must be the string '1'.

apps.description: Registered micro-applications. At least one entry.

description.description: One-line description shown in the launcher.

stack.description: Cosmetic technology tag (does not affect launching).

cwd.description: Working directory, relative to the repo root (forward slashes). launch.cmd[0] and prepare.sentinel resolve from here.

prepare.description: Optional one-time build/install step. null = no prepare. Skipped when 'sentinel' file exists.

cmd.description: argv (no shell). cmd[0] resolves relative to cwd; literal 'python'/'pip' are substituted with the launcher interpreter at runtime.

sentinel.description: File (relative to cwd) whose existence means prepare is already done. null = always run.

launch.description: Required launch command. Spawned with cwd as working directory.

cmd.description: argv. cmd[0] resolves relative to cwd (or PATH); literal 'python' is substituted with the launcher interpreter (sys.executable) at runtime.

argPicker.description: Optional launch-time argument chosen by the user. The launcher lists the files matched by 'glob' (relative to cwd) and 'userGlob' (user files outside the repo), then appends the chosen file's path to cmd.

label.description: Prompt shown above the picker. Defaults to 'Choose an option'.

glob.description: Glob of files to choose from, relative to cwd (forward slashes), e.g. 'examples/*.toml'. Matches are passed as a cwd-relative path.

userGlob.description: Optional additional glob for user-provided files outside the repo; supports ~ and environment-variable expansion and is matched against the filesystem directly (not cwd-relative). Matches are passed as an absolute path. E.g. '~/.config/claude-panes/layouts/*.toml'.

launchMode.description: gui = own window; console = new interactive console (CREATE_NEW_CONSOLE); fire-and-forget = detached, not tracked.

stoppable.description: Whether the launcher offers a Stop action. Must be false when launchMode is fire-and-forget.

configFile.description: Live (git-ignored) config path, relative to repo root. null if none.

configTemplate.description: Committed *.example.json template, relative to repo root. null if none.

configSchema.description: Optional JSON Schema path for the config form, relative to repo root. null = infer from the template shape.

prerequisites.description: Checks run before prepare/launch. Empty = none.

names.description: Passes if at least one is on PATH.
